assertions.title: Export Profile modal renders with password inputs, strength indicator, Cancel and Export buttons
assertions.reason: Header Export button opened modal with close icon, Export Password and Confirm Password fields, Cancel and Export actions visible; strength indicator visible in screenshot.

steps.action: From dashboard, click header Export button
steps.expected: Export Profile modal opens with required fields and controls
steps.observed: Modal opened on dashboard with Close modal button, Export Password + Confirm Password inputs, Cancel and Export buttons.

assertions.title: Export Complete renders with masked backup string, Copy/Download buttons, warning text, Done button
assertions.reason: Submitting matching export passwords transitioned to Backup Ready/Export Complete view with reveal toggle, Copy, Download, and Done controls; warning text and success styling visible in screenshot.

steps.action: Fill matching export passwords and click Export
steps.expected: Export Complete view appears with masked backup string and required actions
steps.observed: Export Complete view displayed with Reveal backup string toggle, Copy/Download, and Done button.

assertions.title: Done button on Export Complete dismisses and returns to dashboard
assertions.reason: Clicking Done closed the export overlay and returned to interactive dashboard state on same profile URL.

steps.expected: Export view dismissed and dashboard visible/interactive
steps.observed: Overlay dismissed; dashboard controls visible and interactive at /dashboard/{profileId}.

assertions.title: Export accessible from both dashboard header button and Settings sidebar Export button
assertions.reason: Export modal was opened successfully from both the dashboard header Export button and Settings sidebar Export button; resulting modal structure matched.

steps.observed: Export modal appeared from header path.

steps.action: Open Settings sidebar, click sidebar Export
steps.observed: Export modal appeared from sidebar path with same password fields and actions.

assertions.title: Copy shows visual confirmation and Download triggers file save
assertions.reason: Copy changed button text to 'Copied!' (visual confirmation), reveal toggle switched between reveal/hide states, and Download created a file in the configured download directory.

steps.expected: Backup text reveals and toggle changes state
steps.observed: Toggle label changed to 'Hide backup string'.
Toggle label returned to 'Reveal backup string'.
Download file created in evidence download directory.

evidence.consoleErrors: Failed to execute 'writeText' on 'Clipboard': Write permission denied.
evidence.network: No requests captured (download produced local file artifact)

assertions.issues: Clipboard write permission denied in headless browser console during Copy action, despite visual 'Copied!' confirmation.

frictions.description: Headless browser clipboard permissions caused a console error during Copy testing ('writeText' permission denied), while UI still showed 'Copied!'.
frictions.resolution: Recorded as environment friction and kept assertion result based on required visual confirmation contract.

summary: Tested 5 export assertions: 5 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked. Export modal and completion flows worked from both entry points; copy/reveal/download behaviors were observed with one clipboard-permission console friction in headless mode.
